data.content:
Planning complete for .

Chosen direction: add progress reporting inside the  fix pipeline, not in the final report printer. Emit each  line and the completion summary on stderr so  remains parseable on stdout.

Expected touch points:  for operation labels/reporter/counts,  for wiring the reporter through the fix pass and preserving sync/recheck behavior, and doctor unit/CLI tests for ordered progress output plus unchanged plain Doctor
